ham.subject: Your Amazon Order # 12345678 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello Ananya,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #12345678 has been successfully processed and is now on its way.

Order Details:
- Item: Wireless Mouse
- Quantity: 1
- Price: 799.00 INR
- Shipping Address: 12 Oak Lane, Mumbai, Maharashtra

Shipment Tracking:
You can track your package using the following link: <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support.

Happy shopping!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear user,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet (Wallet ID: 0xA1B2C3D4) has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To avoid permanent lockout and potential loss of funds, you must verify your account within the next 24 hours.

Please click the link below to confirm your identity:
<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent suspension of your wallet.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
CryptoSecure Support Team
